# PHIX-86688 — UZIO White Label Partner | NRS Purple — Mobile App Test Spec
# Platform: both (android / ios)  ·  Environment: QA (nrspurple-teamadmin.internal.uzio.org)
# Source of element text: UzioMobile src/i18n/locales/en_nrspurple.json + en.json (NO testIDs)
# Generated by: Test Generation Agent (.claude/commands/mobile-test-generation-agent.md)
# Companion artifacts:
#   reports/testcases/PHIX-86688_Testcases.xlsx  (Excel — Summary + Detail + Regression)
#   tests/jira/PHIX-86688/requirements.md         (Requirements Agent output)
#   tests/jira/PHIX-98187/requirements.md         (Backend sub-story — prerequisite)

---

## OVERVIEW

PHIX-86688 stands up the NRS Purple white-label flavor of the UZIO mobile app. The
mobile-app delivery covers: a new `APP_NAME=NRSPURPLE` build (Android `nrspurple`
product flavor + iOS `NrsPurple` scheme), `.env.nrspurple`, branded launcher
icons, splash, header colour (`#563d6e`), square / short brand logos, About Us
copy, kiosk consent text, NRSPURPLE wired into the subdomain-passing list of
`Login.tsx` + `LoginOtp.tsx`, and a new shared error string
`login.socialLoginFailed` used by every flavor.

Tests cover: brand/build smoke, login (including OTP, social/SSO error routing,
unauthorized message), About Us copy, Switch Accounts header, language picker,
kiosk consent, NRS Purple sanity (bottom nav + logout + persistence), two E2E
flows (Time Off approval, Clock In/Out → Team Timesheet), and regression on the
**shared** code paths that affect every other flavor (`LoginContentHelper`
layout, `AboutUs.tsx` alignment, `login.socialLoginFailed` routing,
`Switch Accounts` header now reading `t('APP_NAME')`).

---

Totals: **37 cases** — P1 10 · P2 17 · P3 10 | E2E 2 | Regression 5 (cross-flavor) | Edge 4

Run-context note: **TC-22..TC-26 require flavor-specific builds** (UZIO,
TECHSERVE) and are MANUAL because the MobileAutoQA harness drives one APK/IPA
per session. Re-run sanity against each flavor's build to validate the shared
`LoginContentHelper` / `AboutUs.tsx` / `Login.tsx` changes haven't regressed.

## SHARED SETUP BLOCKS

### S-NRSP-INSTALL — Install the NRS Purple build
```
1) Install the NRS Purple flavor build on the device:
     Android: app-nrspurple-release.apk  (product flavor 'nrspurple')
     iOS:     NrsPurple-built IPA from the NrsPurple xcscheme
2) Confirm the launcher icon shows the new NRS Purple padded logo on a dark base
3) Confirm the launcher / springboard label reads exactly 'NRS Purple'
```

### S-LOGIN — On the NRS Purple Login screen
```
4) launch app
5) dismiss permissions if present
6) dismiss onboarding if present
7) verify "Welcome to NRS Purple" is visible
```

### S-LOGGED-IN-EE — Logged in as NRS Purple EE
```
8) enter "<nrspurple_ee_email>" into field[0]
9) enter "<nrspurple_ee_password>" into field[1]
10) tap "LOGIN"
11) dismiss App Lock (tap "I'll do it later")
12) dismiss permissions if present
13) verify "Time Tracking" is visible      (default landing tab)
```

### S-ON-ABOUT — On the About NRS Purple screen
Run S-LOGGED-IN-EE then:
```
14) open drawer
15) open drawer item "About NRS Purple" (verify_any=["About NRS Purple"])
16) verify "About NRS Purple" is visible
```

# ════════════════════ BUILD / BRANDING ════════════════════

## TC-01: Launcher icon + label
**Precondition:** S-NRSP-INSTALL only (do not launch the app).
```
SETUP   S-NRSP-INSTALL
TEST    1) open OS launcher
        2) verify icon image = NRS Purple padded logo on dark base   (visual)
        3) verify label below icon = "NRS Purple"
        4) tap the icon — verify the NRS Purple app opens
TEARDOWN none
```

## TC-02: Splash logo
```
SETUP   S-NRSP-INSTALL; cold launch the app
TEST    1) observe splash before Login renders
        2) verify splash logo = SQUARE NRS Purple logo  (NrspurpleLogo.svg)
        3) verify splash background = #563d6e
TEARDOWN none
```

## TC-03: Theme colour
```
SETUP   S-LOGIN
TEST    1) verify safe-area / status-bar background = #563d6e
        2) verify Login header background = #563d6e
TEARDOWN none
```

## TC-27 (iOS only): App Icon set
```
SETUP   S-NRSP-INSTALL on an iOS device
TEST    1) on Home Screen, verify icon is sharp and padded
        2) Settings > General > iPhone Storage > NRS Purple — verify Spotlight icon
        3) drag to App Library — verify category icon = NRS Purple
TEARDOWN none
```

## TC-28 (Android only): strings.xml app_name
```
SETUP   S-NRSP-INSTALL on Android
TEST    1) open app drawer — verify label below icon = "NRS Purple"
        2) launch the app, then open Recents — verify task title = "NRS Purple"
TEARDOWN none
```

# ════════════════════ LOGIN ════════════════════

## TC-04: Heading
```
SETUP   S-LOGIN
TEST    1) verify "Welcome to NRS Purple" is visible
        2) verify "Welcome to UZIO" is NOT visible
TEARDOWN none
```

## TC-05: Logo + layout
```
SETUP   S-LOGIN
TEST    1) verify the square NRS Purple logo is rendered above the form
        2) verify the logo wrapper is left-aligned (no large left margin)
        3) verify the logo wrapper width ~= 55% of the screen width
        4) verify "Username (Email Address)" and "Password" fields are reachable
TEARDOWN none
```

## TC-06: Valid EE login
```
SETUP   S-LOGIN
TEST    1) login as NRS Purple EE
        2) dismiss App Lock; dismiss permissions
        3) verify "Time Tracking" is visible      (dashboard)
        4) verify header colour = #563d6e
TEARDOWN logout
```

## TC-07: subdomain in Login POST
```
SETUP   S-LOGIN with HTTP capture enabled (BrowserStack Network log)
TEST    1) submit valid login
        2) inspect POST to Api.LOGIN
        3) verify request body JSON has a "subdomain" key
        4) verify "subdomain" value matches systemConfigs.EXCHANGE_SUBDOMAIN
TEARDOWN logout
```

## TC-08: Invalid credentials
```
SETUP   S-LOGIN
TEST    1) enter known email, wrong password
        2) tap "LOGIN"
        3) verify "The username or password is incorrect." is visible
        4) verify still on Login screen (no dashboard nav)
TEARDOWN none
```

## TC-09: Social-login failure text
```
SETUP   S-LOGIN
TEST    1) trigger a social-login failure (cancel Google OAuth, etc.)
        2) verify "Social login failed. Please try again" is visible
        3) verify "SSO login failed. Please try again" is NOT visible
TEARDOWN none
```

## TC-10: SSO-login failure text (regression on the SSO branch)
```
SETUP   S-LOGIN, switch to SSO entry point (Work Email)
TEST    1) enter SSO email; cancel IdP redirect
        2) verify "SSO login failed. Please try again" is visible
        3) verify "Social login failed. Please try again" is NOT visible
TEARDOWN none
```

## TC-11: OTP subdomain
```
SETUP   S-LOGIN with HTTP capture; account has 2-Step Verification enabled;
        enter creds and reach the "Enter the 6 digit verification code" screen
TEST    1) tap "Resend Code" — inspect send-OTP POST: body has "subdomain"
        2) enter the code; tap "Verify Code" — inspect verify POST: body has "subdomain"
        3) verify dashboard loads
TEARDOWN logout
```

## TC-12: Unauthorized message
```
SETUP   S-LOGIN; a known UZIO-only user (no NRS Purple mapping) is available
TEST    1) enter the non-NRS-Purple user's credentials
        2) tap "LOGIN"
        3) verify "You are not authorized to access NRS Purple mobile application." is visible
        4) verify "UZIO" does NOT appear in the error
TEARDOWN none
```

```
TEST    1) open drawer → SETTINGS → tap "Language"
        2) verify exactly one option labelled "English" is visible
        3) select it (or re-select)

TEARDOWN close drawer
```

```
        registration consent screen
TEST    1) read the consent body
        2) verify paragraph 1 contains "...by NRS Purple and its service providers..."
        3) verify paragraph 2 contains "...NRS Purple Kiosk facial recognition feature..."
        4) verify the body contains NO "UZIO" reference
TEARDOWN press back
```

# ════════════════════ SANITY (NRS Purple end-to-end) ════════════════════

## TC-33: Bottom nav reachable
```
SETUP   S-LOGGED-IN-EE
TEST    1) verify each visible tab opens its screen:
            Benefits, Schedule, Time Tracking, Time Off, Inbox
        2) skip-not-fail: gated-off tabs may be absent — must NOT crash
TEARDOWN none
```

## TC-34: Logout
```
SETUP   S-LOGGED-IN-EE
TEST    1) open drawer; scroll to bottom; tap "Logout"
        2) confirm logout dialog
        3) verify "Welcome to NRS Purple" is visible (back on Login)
TEARDOWN none
```

## TC-35: Session persistence
```
SETUP   S-LOGGED-IN-EE; configure driver session with no_reset=True
TEST    1) background the app
        2) kill it from Recents / App Switcher
        3) relaunch
        4) verify dashboard renders WITHOUT a Login screen
TEARDOWN none
```

# ════════════════════ E2E (Pattern E — manager approval) ════════════════════

## E2E-01: EE Time Off → Manager approve (NRS Purple)
```
SETUP   S-LOGGED-IN-EE  (NRS Purple EE with Time Off policy assigned)
TEST    1) tap tab "Time Off"
        2) tap "Request Time Off"
        3) tap "Select Time Off Type" → choose a type
        4) set Start Date and End Date (future, non-holiday)
        5) enter hour increment > 0
        6) tap "Submit for Approval"
        7) verify "Request Submitted Successfully" is visible
        8) open drawer; tap "Logout"
        9) login as Manager (NRS Purple Manager) on the SAME build
       10) open drawer → MANAGE TEAM → "Team Time Off"
       11) verify the EE's pending request is listed
       12) approve the request
       13) logout Manager; re-login as the EE
       14) tap tab "Time Off"; verify request status = "Approved"
TEARDOWN logout
```

## E2E-02: Clock In/Out → Team Timesheet (NRS Purple)
```
SETUP   S-LOGGED-IN-EE
TEST    1) tap "Clock In"
        2) verify "You are Clocked In" — tap "Close"
        3) verify clocked-in state ("Clock Out" visible / "Clocked In" sub-heading)
        4) tap "Clock Out"
        5) dismiss attestation if present (tap "Save and Clock Out")
        6) verify "You are Clocked Out" — tap "Close"
        7) logout EE; login as Manager on the SAME build
        8) open drawer → MANAGE TEAM → "Team Timesheet"
        9) verify the EE's freshly created time entry is listed for today
TEARDOWN logout
```

---

# ════════════════════ REGRESSION (other flavors — shared code paths) ════════════════════

Run against the corresponding flavor build (UZIO / TECHSERVE / etc.). These are
**Manual** unless the lab has multi-flavor builds wired up. They guard against
regressions introduced by edits to **shared** files
(`LoginContentHelper.tsx`, `AboutUs.tsx`, `Login.tsx`,
`LoginResigterAccounts.tsx`, `i18n/locales/en.json`).

## TC-22: UZIO — Login logo wrapper no truncation
```
SETUP   Install UZIO build; launch; reach Login
TEST    1) verify UZIO logo renders cleanly (no clipping or overlap)
        2) verify logo is now left-aligned (shared wrapper change)
        3) verify form fields + "LOGIN" button are reachable
        4) submit a valid UZIO login → verify dashboard loads
TEARDOWN logout
```

## TC-23: UZIO — About Us alignment no regression
```
SETUP   Login on UZIO build; open drawer → "About UZIO"
TEST    1) verify heading "About UZIO" (unchanged)
        2) verify logo top-aligned with heading row (flex-start)
        3) verify subheading "UZIO" renders without overlap
        4) verify version and copyright still render
TEARDOWN press back
```

## TC-24: UZIO — non-SSO failure now uses "Social login failed…"
```
SETUP   UZIO build; on Login screen
TEST    1) trigger a social-login failure (cancel Google OAuth)
        2) verify "Social login failed. Please try again" is visible
        3) trigger an SSO-login failure separately
        4) verify "SSO login failed. Please try again" still shows for SSO
TEARDOWN none
```

## TC-25: UZIO — Switch Accounts header still reads "Uzio"
```
SETUP   Login on UZIO build; navigate to Switch / Register Accounts
TEST    1) verify the app-name label is non-empty
        2) verify it reads "Uzio" or "UZIO" (per en.json APP_NAME)
TEARDOWN none
```

## TC-26: TECHSERVE — Login layout no regression
```
SETUP   Install TECHSERVE build; launch; reach Login
TEST    1) verify the TECHSERVE logo renders fully (no clipping)
        2) verify form fields are reachable
        3) submit valid TECHSERVE login → verify dashboard loads
TEARDOWN logout
```

# ════════════════════ EDGE / NEGATIVE ════════════════════

## TC-29: Non-NRSPURPLE build shows no NRS Purple branding
```
SETUP   Install UZIO (or other non-NRSPURPLE) flavor build
TEST    1) verify launcher icon is the flavor's own (not NRS Purple)
        2) Login heading reads "Welcome to <flavor>", NOT "Welcome to NRS Purple"
        3) safe-area / header colour is NOT #563d6e
        4) About heading reads "About <flavor>", NOT "About NRS Purple"
TEARDOWN none
```

## TC-30: Default locale en_nrspurple before login
```
SETUP   S-NRSP-INSTALL; fresh install (no prior locale stored)
TEST    1) cold launch the NRS Purple app
        2) on Login, verify "Welcome to NRS Purple" before any user action
        3) verify other visible strings (Forgot Password helper) render English
        4) verify no UZIO copy leaks (en_nrspurple bundle is the active locale)
TEARDOWN none
```

## TC-31: Server unreachable
```
SETUP   S-LOGIN
TEST    1) enable airplane mode
        2) enter valid NRS Purple EE creds; tap "LOGIN"
        3) observe error / retry handling — verify no crash
        4) disable airplane mode; re-submit
        5) verify the app recovers and logs in
TEARDOWN logout
```

## TC-32: Drawer placement
```
SETUP   S-LOGGED-IN-EE; open drawer
TEST    1) verify section order: TIME AND ATTENDANCE → PAY → PERSONAL →
           SETTINGS → HELP AND SUPPORT
        2) verify "About NRS Purple" appears under HELP AND SUPPORT exactly once
        3) verify no NRS Purple-only items have leaked into other sections
TEARDOWN close drawer
```

---

# ════════════════════ PREREQUISITES / RUN NOTES ════════════════════

- **Backend prerequisite — PHIX-98187**: Auth0 PEM, NeuronDB email templates,
  Mobile URL, SAML key file rename. TC-06 / TC-07 / TC-11 / TC-12 / E2E-01 /
  E2E-02 cannot be executed end-to-end on QA until PHIX-98187 is deployed.
- **Test users needed in NRS Purple QA exchange**:
  1. An EE with Time Tracking + Time Off enabled (E2E-02 / E2E-01 / TC-33..35)
  2. A reportee EE for E2E-01 (optional — use the same EE if a 1:1 manager exists)
  3. A Manager who supervises the EE (E2E-01 / E2E-02)
  4. A Manager-Kiosk for TC-21
  5. A NON-NRS-Purple UZIO account for TC-12
- **Build artifacts needed**:
  - Android nrspurple flavor APK (release)
  - iOS NrsPurple-built IPA
  - For TC-22..TC-26 / TC-29: matching UZIO and TECHSERVE flavor builds
- **Network log capture** (TC-07 / TC-11): BrowserStack Network log, or Charles
  proxy with the device trusting the Charles root cert.
- **Locator strategy** — the app has NO testIDs, so every assertion is against
  visible text resolved from `en_nrspurple.json` / `en.json`. Add a
  flavor-aware helper in MobileAutoQA (`flavor_strings.heading(APP_NAME)`)
  rather than hard-coding constants per flavor.
- **Skip-not-fail** — feature-gated tabs / drawer items must `pytest.skip`,
  not `fail`. This is per-employer (NRS Purple QA exchange config).
- **Security** — Pay / Tax / Payment Method cases are excluded from this
  spec (load-only by policy); they belong in the global sanity suite.
